authority: authoring-template-only; not evidence until generated by a real coverage command
required_generation: Name the exact coverage command, tool, target paths, measured dimensions, timestamp, percentage, floor, uncovered records, exclusions, and claim ceiling.
Do not treat test pass counts, fixture tests, mocks, smoke tests, or reviewer signoff as coverage proof.
When the repo adopts 100 percent coverage, uncovered repo-owned code blocks complete, ready, done, production-ready, and release claims.
Temporary lower floors must be ratchet floors with owner, reason, fresh artifact, blocker or tech-debt record, and withheld claim ceiling.
Generated, vendor, and external exclusions require a mechanical exclude list with rationale; exclusions are not counted as covered.
